category: Using The Vendor Neutral Contingency And Ras Auxiliary File
description: Use this API to read a Contingency Definition and Remedial Actions auxiliary file into memory. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.6.0. ierr = read_ras(ifile)

parameters.name: ifile
parameters.description: Contingency definition and remedial actions auxiliary file. (input).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
